why: Post-rebuild audit revealed gaps in the XA catalog workflow. Live product demotion risk means a single accidental incomplete save can silently remove products from the store. Missing session UI blocks multi-storefront operation.

intended_outcome.statement: XA catalog workflow is production-safe — live products cannot be silently unpublished, console has storefront selector and logout, sync error handling covers all confirmation codes, and dead ZIP/submission code is removed.
